summary: Tested Mira party planning suggestions feature - When user asks for party planning, Mira returns 3-4 suggestion cards with emojis that appear in PICKS panel with 'Send to Concierge' option
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mira party suggestions feature fully working. Backend returns concierge_arranges array with 3-4 emoji-titled cards, picks_contract has fallback_mode='concierge'. Frontend PICKS panel displays cards under 'CONCIERGE® ARRANGES' section with 'Concierge Pick' badge.

backend_api.concierge_arranges_array: PASS - Returns 3-4 suggestion cards with emoji titles (🎂, 🎈, 📸, 🦴)
backend_api.card_structure: PASS - Each card has: id, type='mira_suggestion', title with emoji, subtitle='Price on request', description, action='add_to_request', pillar='celebrate'
backend_api.suggested_pillar: PASS - Returns 'celebrate' for birthday party planning

frontend_ui.picks_panel_update: PASS - Shows 'CONCIERGE® ARRANGES FOR MOJO' section
frontend_ui.suggestion_cards: PASS - Displays cards with 'Concierge Pick' badge
frontend_ui.icon_badge: PASS - PICKS tab shows notification badge (+2) when new suggestions arrive
frontend_ui.celebrate_tab: PASS - Celebrate pillar tab is highlighted
